MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas R. Burke of Davis Wright Tremaine, LLP, 276-6552, appearing for defendant and moving party
Stanley Hilton, 786-4821, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NBC STUDIOS, INC'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees. Award of fees to successful moving party under CCP 425.16 is mandatory. Court awards $53,000 as reasonable fees. Order denying Motion for Reconsideration (August 4, 2006 hearing) and Judgment signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
